ontology_relation_candidates.label: P463 : member of
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Indicates that the subject is a member of a group, organization, or unit.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: P463 is a widely used, semantically stable relation in Wikidata and other knowledge graphs, reusable across many documents and contexts.

evidence.snippet: ngsbury Huntington ( 13 March 1921 – 5 June 1942 ) , was a naval aircrewman and member of Torpedo Squadron 8 ( or VT-8 ) . He was radioman / gunner to Ensign George Gay 's TBD Devastator a
